<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>OLA Ride Analytics — Project Documentation</title>
<style>
  :root {
    --green: #8DC63F;
    --dark: #1a1a1a;
    --darker: #111;
    --card-bg: #1e1e1e;
    --border: #2e2e2e;
    --text: #e8e8e8;
    --muted: #888;
    --accent: #8DC63F;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  body {
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    background: var(--darker);
    color: var(--text);
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* HEADER */
  .hero {
    background: var(--dark);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 60px 40px 50px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .hero-logo {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .ola-icon {
    width: 52px; height: 52px;
    background: var(--green);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }
  .ola-icon span {
    width: 18px; height: 18px;
    background: var(--dark);
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 3px solid var(--dark);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--green);
  }
  .hero h1 { font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.5px; color: #fff; }
  .hero h1 span { color: var(--green); }
  .hero p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 10px; max-width: 600px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }

  .badges { display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: center; margin-top: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .badge {
    padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .badge-green { background: #1c2e0a; color: var(--green); border: 1px solid #3a5c14; }
  .badge-blue { background: #0a1a2e; color: #60a5fa; border: 1px solid #1e3a5f; }
  .badge-yellow { background: #2e240a; color: #fbbf24; border: 1px solid #5c480a; }

  /* KPI STRIP */
  .kpi-strip {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .kpi-item {
    padding: 28px 24px;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .kpi-item:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .kpi-value { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green); }
  .kpi-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.8px; }

  /* SECTIONS */
  .container { max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 60px 40px; }
  .section { margin-bottom: 70px; }
  .section-header {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 32px; padding-bottom: 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .step-badge {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--green); color: #000;
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .section-title { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; }
  .section-subtitle { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 2px; }

  /* TOOL CARDS */
  .tool-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .tool-card {
    background: var(--card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 20px;
  }
  .tool-card .tool-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .tool-card .tool-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }
  .tool-card .tool-icon { font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 10px; }

  /* SQL QUERIES */
  .sql-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
  .sql-card {
    background: var(--card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .sql-header {
    padding: 12px 16px;
    background: #161616;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  }
  .q-num {
    background: var(--green); color: #000;
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .q-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #ccc; }
  .sql-body { padding: 14px 16px; }
  pre {
    font-family: 'Cascadia Code', 'Fira Code', monospace;
    font-size: 11.5px;
    color: #cdd6f4;
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow: auto;
    white-space: pre-wrap;
  }
  .keyword { color: #cba6f7; }
  .fn { color: #89b4fa; }
  .string { color: #a6e3a1; }
  .view-name { color: #f9e2af; }
  .sql-insight {
    padding: 10px 16px 14px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .sql-insight strong { color: var(--green); }

  /* DASHBOARD PAGES */
  .dash-page { margin-bottom: 40px; }
  .dash-meta {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .page-num {
    background: #1a2e0a; color: var(--green);
    border: 1px solid #3a5c14;
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700;
    padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px;
    white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 3px;
  }
  .dash-info h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .dash-info p { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); }
  .dash-img {
    width: 100%;
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: block;
  }
  .insight-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 14px; }
  .pill {
    font-size: 12px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
    background: #1c2e0a; color: var(--green); border: 1px solid #3a5c14;
  }

  /* WORKFLOW */
  .workflow {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0;
    background: var(--card-bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .wf-step {
    flex: 1; padding: 20px 18px; text-align: center;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .wf-step:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .wf-icon { font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .wf-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .wf-desc { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); }

  /* FILES TABLE */
  .files-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
  .files-table th {
    text-align: left; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted);
    padding: 10px 16px; background: #161616;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .files-table td {
    padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    font-size: 13px; vertical-align: middle;
  }
  .files-table tr:nth-child(even) td { background: #191919; }
  code {
    background: #2a2a2a; color: var(--green);
    padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px;
  }

  /* INSIGHTS */
  .insights-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
  .insight-card {
    background: var(--card-bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--green);
    border-radius: 8px; padding: 18px 20px;
  }
  .insight-card h4 { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .insight-card p { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 30px 40px; text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted);
  }
  footer span { color: var(--green); }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-logo">
    <div class="ola-icon"><span></span></div>
    <h1>OLA <span>Data Analytics</span></h1>
  </div>
  <p>End-to-end ride booking analysis — from raw CSV data to interactive Power BI dashboards, powered by MySQL and Excel.</p>
  <div class="badges">
    <span class="badge badge-green">MySQL 8.x</span>
    <span class="badge badge-yellow">Microsoft Excel</span>
    <span class="badge badge-blue">Power BI Desktop</span>
    <span class="badge badge-green">103,024 Records</span>
    <span class="badge badge-yellow">July 2024</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="kpi-strip">
  <div class="kpi-item"><div class="kpi-value">103,024</div><div class="kpi-label">Total Bookings</div></div>
  <div class="kpi-item"><div class="kpi-value">&#8377;35.08M</div><div class="kpi-label">Booking Value</div></div>
  <div class="kpi-item"><div class="kpi-value">62.09%</div><div class="kpi-label">Success Rate</div></div>
  <div class="kpi-item"><div class="kpi-value">28.08%</div><div class="kpi-label">Cancellation Rate</div></div>
</div>

<div class="container">

  <!-- STEP 1: TOOLS -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-badge">1</div>
      <div>
        <div class="section-title">Tools Used</div>
        <div class="section-subtitle">Three-layer analytics stack</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="tool-grid">
      <div class="tool-card">
        <div class="tool-icon">🗄️</div>
        <div class="tool-name">MySQL 8.x</div>
        <div class="tool-desc">Database creation, data storage, SQL Views for 10 business questions covering bookings, cancellations, ratings, and revenue.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tool-card">
        <div class="tool-icon">📊</div>
        <div class="tool-name">Microsoft Excel</div>
        <div class="tool-desc">Initial data inspection, cleaning, and preparation of the Bookings.csv dataset before importing into MySQL and Power BI.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tool-card">
        <div class="tool-icon">📈</div>
        <div class="tool-name">Power BI Desktop</div>
        <div class="tool-desc">5-page interactive dashboard with date slicers, KPI cards, pie charts, bar charts, and line charts for full visual analysis.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="workflow">
      <div class="wf-step"><div class="wf-icon">📁</div><div class="wf-name">Raw Data</div><div class="wf-desc">Bookings.csv (103K rows)</div></div>
      <div class="wf-step"><div class="wf-icon">📊</div><div class="wf-name">Excel</div><div class="wf-desc">Clean &amp; inspect</div></div>
      <div class="wf-step"><div class="wf-icon">🗄️</div><div class="wf-name">MySQL</div><div class="wf-desc">10 SQL Views</div></div>
      <div class="wf-step"><div class="wf-icon">📈</div><div class="wf-name">Power BI</div><div class="wf-desc">5-page dashboard</div></div>
      <div class="wf-step"><div class="wf-icon">💡</div><div class="wf-name">Insights</div><div class="wf-desc">Business decisions</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STEP 2: DATASET -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-badge">2</div>
      <div>
        <div class="section-title">Dataset Overview</div>
        <div class="section-subtitle">Bookings.csv — 103,024 rows × 20 columns</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <table class="files-table">
      <thead><tr><th>Column</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td><code>Booking_ID</code></td><td>String</td><td>Unique ride identifier (e.g. CNR7153255142)</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Booking_Status</code></td><td>Categorical</td><td>Success / Canceled by Driver / Canceled by Customer / Driver Not Found</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Customer_ID</code></td><td>String</td><td>Anonymized customer ID (e.g. CID713523)</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Vehicle_Type</code></td><td>Categorical</td><td>Prime Sedan, Prime SUV, Prime Plus, Mini, Auto, Bike, E-Bike</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Pickup_Location / Drop_Location</code></td><td>String</td><td>Area names within city</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Booking_Value</code></td><td>Numeric</td><td>Fare in INR</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Payment_Method</code></td><td>Categorical</td><td>Cash / UPI / Credit Card / Debit Card</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Ride_Distance</code></td><td>Numeric</td><td>Distance in km</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Driver_Ratings / Customer_Rating</code></td><td>Numeric</td><td>Rating out of 5</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Incomplete_Rides</code></td><td>Boolean</td><td>Yes / No + reason</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- STEP 3: SQL -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-badge">3</div>
      <div>
        <div class="section-title">SQL Analysis — 10 Business Questions</div>
        <div class="section-subtitle">Each query creates a reusable View in MySQL</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sql-grid">

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q1</span><span class="q-title">Retrieve all successful bookings</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">Successful_Bookings</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span> * <span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">WHERE</span> Booking_Status = <span class="string">'Success'</span>;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> Filters 63,967 successful rides for revenue and rating analysis.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q2</span><span class="q-title">Average ride distance per vehicle type</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">ride_distance_for_each_vehicle</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span> Vehicle_Type,
  <span class="fn">AVG</span>(Ride_Distance) <span class="keyword">AS</span> avg_distance
<span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">GROUP BY</span> Vehicle_Type;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> Auto averages only ~10 km vs ~25 km for sedans — distinct use cases.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q3</span><span class="q-title">Total rides cancelled by customers</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">canceled_rides_by_customers</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span> <span class="fn">COUNT</span>(*) <span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">WHERE</span> Booking_Status =
  <span class="string">'Canceled by Customer'</span>;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> 10,499 customer cancellations (10.19% of total bookings).</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q4</span><span class="q-title">Top 5 customers by ride count</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">Top_5_Customers</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span> Customer_ID,
  <span class="fn">COUNT</span>(Booking_ID) <span class="keyword">AS</span> total_rides
<span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">GROUP BY</span> Customer_ID
<span class="keyword">ORDER BY</span> total_rides <span class="keyword">DESC LIMIT</span> 5;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> Identifies power users for loyalty and retention programs.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q5</span><span class="q-title">Driver cancellations — personal/car issues</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">Rides_Canceled_by_Drivers_P_C_Issues</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span> <span class="fn">COUNT</span>(*) <span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">WHERE</span> Canceled_Rides_by_Driver =
  <span class="string">'Personal &amp; Car related issue'</span>;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> #1 driver cancellation reason at 35.49% — flags fleet maintenance needs.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q6</span><span class="q-title">Max &amp; min driver ratings — Prime Sedan</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">MAX_MIN_Driver_Rating</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span>
  <span class="fn">MAX</span>(Driver_Ratings) <span class="keyword">AS</span> max_rating,
  <span class="fn">MIN</span>(Driver_Ratings) <span class="keyword">AS</span> min_rating
<span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">WHERE</span> Vehicle_Type = <span class="string">'Prime Sedan'</span>;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> Quality spread in the premium segment — flags underperforming drivers.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q7</span><span class="q-title">All rides paid via UPI</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">UPI_Payment</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span> * <span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">WHERE</span> Payment_Method = <span class="string">'UPI'</span>;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> 25,881 UPI transactions (25.1%) for payment trend analysis.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q8</span><span class="q-title">Average customer rating per vehicle type</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">AVG_cust_Rating</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span> Vehicle_Type,
  <span class="fn">AVG</span>(Customer_Rating) <span class="keyword">AS</span> avg_customer_rating
<span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">GROUP BY</span> Vehicle_Type;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> Ratings uniformly ~4.0 across all vehicle types (3.99–4.01).</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q9</span><span class="q-title">Total value of successful rides</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">total_successful_ride_value</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span>
  <span class="fn">SUM</span>(Booking_Value) <span class="keyword">AS</span> total_value
<span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">WHERE</span> Booking_Status = <span class="string">'Success'</span>;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> Net realizable revenue after filtering failed and cancelled bookings.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sql-card">
        <div class="sql-header"><span class="q-num">Q10</span><span class="q-title">Incomplete rides with reasons</span></div>
        <div class="sql-body"><pre><span class="keyword">CREATE VIEW</span> <span class="view-name">Incomplete_Rides_Reason</span> <span class="keyword">AS</span>
<span class="keyword">SELECT</span> Booking_Id,
  Incomplete_Rides_Reason
<span class="keyword">FROM</span> bookings
<span class="keyword">WHERE</span> Incomplete_Rides = <span class="string">'Yes'</span>;</pre></div>
        <div class="sql-insight"><strong>Insight:</strong> Surfaces mid-trip failures for driver training and safety audits.</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STEP 4: POWER BI -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-badge">4</div>
      <div>
        <div class="section-title">Power BI Dashboard — 5 Pages</div>
        <div class="section-subtitle">Interactive date-filtered dashboards (July 1 – 31, 2024)</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dash-page">
      <div class="dash-meta">
        <span class="page-num">PAGE 1</span>
        <div class="dash-info">
          <h3>Overall Summary</h3>
          <p>High-level KPIs, booking status breakdown (pie chart), and daily ride volume trend line.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img class="dash-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Overall Dashboard">
      <div class="insight-pills">
        <span class="pill">103,024 total bookings</span>
        <span class="pill">&#8377;35.08M booking value</span>
        <span class="pill">62.09% success rate</span>
        <span class="pill">Spike detected Jul 28</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dash-page">
      <div class="dash-meta">
        <span class="page-num">PAGE 2</span>
        <div class="dash-info">
          <h3>Vehicle Type Performance</h3>
          <p>Side-by-side table comparing all 7 vehicle types across booking value, success value, avg distance, and total distance.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img class="dash-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Vehicle Type Dashboard">
      <div class="insight-pills">
        <span class="pill">Prime Sedan leads at &#8377;8.30M</span>
        <span class="pill">Auto shortest avg 10.04 km</span>
        <span class="pill">E-Bike highest avg distance 25.15 km</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dash-page">
      <div class="dash-meta">
        <span class="page-num">PAGE 3</span>
        <div class="dash-info">
          <h3>Revenue Analysis</h3>
          <p>Revenue by payment method (bar chart), top 5 customers by value, and daily ride distance trend.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img class="dash-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Revenue Dashboard">
      <div class="insight-pills">
        <span class="pill">Cash dominates at &#8377;19M+</span>
        <span class="pill">UPI second at &#8377;14M</span>
        <span class="pill">Top customer CID785112 = &#8377;8,025</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dash-page">
      <div class="dash-meta">
        <span class="page-num">PAGE 4</span>
        <div class="dash-info">
          <h3>Cancellation Analysis</h3>
          <p>Cancellation KPIs, customer cancellation reasons, and driver cancellation reasons (dual pie charts).</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img class="dash-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Cancellation Dashboard">
      <div class="insight-pills">
        <span class="pill">28,933 cancellations</span>
        <span class="pill">28.08% cancellation rate</span>
        <span class="pill">Driver not moving = top customer reason (30%)</span>
        <span class="pill">Car issues = top driver reason (35%)</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dash-page">
      <div class="dash-meta">
        <span class="page-num">PAGE 5</span>
        <div class="dash-info">
          <h3>Ratings Analysis</h3>
          <p>Driver and customer average ratings broken down by all 7 vehicle types — reveals consistency across the platform.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img class="dash-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Ratings Dashboard">
      <div class="insight-pills">
        <span class="pill">Driver ratings: 3.98–4.01</span>
        <span class="pill">Customer ratings: 3.99–4.01</span>
        <span class="pill">Highly consistent across all vehicle types</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STEP 5: INSIGHTS -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-badge">5</div>
      <div>
        <div class="section-title">Key Business Insights</div>
        <div class="section-subtitle">Actionable findings from the analysis</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="insights-grid">
      <div class="insight-card">
        <h4>High Cancellation Rate (28%)</h4>
        <p>Nearly 1 in 3 bookings fails to complete. Driver-side cancellations due to personal/car issues (35.49%) point to fleet maintenance and driver reliability gaps.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="insight-card">
        <h4>Cash Still Dominates Payments</h4>
        <p>Cash accounts for ~&#8377;19M vs UPI&#8217;s &#8377;14M. There&#8217;s a clear opportunity to incentivize digital payment adoption for better tracking.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="insight-card">
        <h4>Auto Has a Distinct Use Pattern</h4>
        <p>Average distance of only 10.04 km vs ~25 km for all other vehicle types — Auto serves a pure last-mile urban segment requiring different pricing.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="insight-card">
        <h4>Ratings Uniformly High (~4.0)</h4>
        <p>Both driver and customer ratings sit within a tight 3.98–4.01 band across all 7 vehicle types, indicating consistent service quality platform-wide.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="insight-card">
        <h4>Prime Sedan Leads Revenue</h4>
        <p>&#8377;8.30M total booking value and &#8377;5.22M successful booking value makes Prime Sedan the highest revenue contributor among all vehicle categories.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="insight-card">
        <h4>Driver Not Moving = Top Complaint</h4>
        <p>30.24% of customer-side cancellations happen because the driver isn&#8217;t moving toward pickup — a real-time tracking/enforcement issue to address.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FILES -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-badge">6</div>
      <div>
        <div class="section-title">Repository Files</div>
        <div class="section-subtitle">Everything needed to reproduce the project</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <table class="files-table">
      <thead><tr><th>File</th><th>Tool</th><th>Purpose</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td><code>Bookings.csv</code></td><td>Excel / MySQL</td><td>Raw dataset — 103,024 booking records, 20 columns</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>ola_project.sql</code></td><td>MySQL</td><td>Database creation + 10 SQL Views for business analysis</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>Ola.pbix</code></td><td>Power BI</td><td>5-page interactive dashboard with date slicer</td></tr>
        <tr><td><code>README.md / README.html</code></td><td>GitHub</td><td>Project documentation with steps and screenshots</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

</div>

<footer>
  <p>OLA Ride Analytics Project &nbsp;|&nbsp; Data Period: <span>July 2024</span> &nbsp;|&nbsp; Tools: <span>Excel → MySQL → Power BI</span></p>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
